criterion.metrics-feedback-available: Relevant market signals, feedback, or operational insights are available to guide this API opportunity.
criterion.stakeholder-approval: Relevant stakeholders agree this API opportunity is worth exploring and prioritizing.
criterion.api-opportunity-documented: Individual API opportunities are identified and documented.
criterion.api-reusability: The API meets a clear business need and is reusable for multiple API consumers.
criterion.hide-backend-discrepancies: The API is intended to shield consumers from backend complexity and inconsistencies.
criterion.value-prop-validated: The API value proposition has been reviewed and validated with the relevant business and consumer stakeholders.
criterion.consumer-segments-identified: API consumer segments (internal and external) are identified.
criterion.api-roadmap-defined: High-level roadmaps for API development are established.
criterion.architecture-patterns-validate: The chosen API architecture and platform patterns have been validated with the relevant architecture, security, and platform stakeholders.
criterion.design-reflects-business-value: The API design and exposed capabilities clearly trace back to business value and user needs.
criterion.api-consistency: The API design follows our shared API product and design conventions.
criterion.api-contract-tested: The API contract is tested and meets functional and non-functional requirements.
criterion.api-description-available: The API and its exposed capabilities are described clearly enough for review, audit, and onboarding.
criterion.audit-passed: The API passes compliance, security, and audit checks.
criterion.audit-reports-shared: Audit findings and remediation decisions are shared with the relevant stakeholders.
criterion.api-ready-for-publishing: The API is ready to be deployed and exposed through the intended gateways and environments.
criterion.api-documentation-ready: Consumer-facing API documentation is complete enough for publishing and onboarding.
criterion.consumer-support-ready: Registration, support, and communication processes are ready for API consumers.
criterion.legal-compliance-clear: Legal, privacy, and compliance requirements for publishing are defined and understood.
